value.description: Fox-spliced xenohumans with formidable psychic talents. It is said that a vulpid grows one extra tail for every century lived, their psychic powers increasing with each.\n\nConsidering how many nine-tailed vulpids seem to be about, that seems questionable.

Cat-spliced xenohumans with a dangerous trickster streak. Some rumors even claim they have the ability to steal the psychic essence of the dead.\n\nSince there are almost no documented cases of a cat living for more than half a week on the Rim, where this gene-line came from is anyone's guess.
The outlanders claim that hornbrute raiders show up for one of two reasons. Either they are drunks on a rampage, or they are sober and are trying to steal alcohol.
The outlanders claim that hornbrute raiders show up for one of two reasons. Either they are drunks on a rampage, or they are sober and are trying to steal alcohol.

The outlanders claim that hornbrute raiders show up for one of two reasons. Either they are drunks on a rampage, or they are sober and are trying to steal alcohol. These ones are bigger, meaner, and even more trouble than the rest.

The outlanders claim that hornbrute raiders show up for one of two reasons. Either they are drunks on a rampage, or they are sober and are trying to steal alcohol. These ones are bigger, meaner, and even more trouble than the rest.
Small, ugly and highly energetic hornbrutes with a penchant for being found blackout drunk in the breweries of their enemies.
A loose union of chimeric xenohumans. All gene-lines are welcome.\n\nIf you're not one of them you'd better be bringing alcohol. Lots of alcohol.
